SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-18-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARMAS, JESI GAURDIAN AD LITEM JOHNSON, SOPHIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOUIE, JASMINE PEARL JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO MEET HER BURDEN OF PROOF. MINOR DEFENDANT WAS INJURED ON HER KNEE AS A RESULT OF A DOG BITE - SHE DID NTO SEE DEFENDANT'S DOG BITE HER. SHE FELT PAIN AND LOOKED DOWN AND 2 DOGS WERE STANDING NEXT TO HER INCLUDING HER OWN DOG. NO OTHER WITNESSES WERE PROVIDED. PLAINTIFF IS SEEKINGNONLY PAIN AND SUFFERING DAMAGES. BUT PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PROVIDED ANY EVIDENCE OF PAIN AND SUFFERING. SEE COMPLETE RULING ON THE REGISTER OF ACTION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 SERVED JUN-04-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOUIE, JASMINE PEARL
APPLICATION FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARMAS, JESI GAURDIAN AD LITEM JOHNSON, SOPHIA
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO GASPAR DUENAS
APPLICATION FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARMAS, JESI GAURDIAN AD LITEM JOHNSON, SOPHIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-18-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-18-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS JESI ARMAS GUARDIAN AD LITEM AND SOPHIA JOHNSON ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT JASMINE PEARL LOUIE IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
